title: ICEPURE Refrigerator Water Filter Compatible with Samsung DA29-10105J, DA29-10105J HAFEX/EXP, DA99-02131B, WSF-100, EF9603, HAIER LG Inline Refrigerator, 2 Pieces.
features: COMPATIBLE WITH Samsung DA29-10105J, EF-9603, WSF-100, HAFEX/EXP, DA29-10105C, DA29-10105E, DA99-02131B, BL-980808, K320 10CB, LG 5231JA2010B, 5231JA2010A, 5231JA2003B, 3650JD8050A, 3890JC2990A, 5231JA2010C, LG BL-9808 BL-9303, Haier 0060823485A. WARNING: The use of brand names is purely for clarification of compatibility.

CERTIFIED MANUFACTURING AND QUALITY: We do not compromise on water filters and your HEALTH. The filters from ICEPURE are all tested and certified according to the standards of renowned institutes. IAPMO and others have tested our product and confirmed its functionality as well as its compliance with all applicable regulations.

INNOVATIVE FILTRATION TECHNOLOGY: Our innovative multi-layer filtration technology makes our water filters particularly efficient. The EVERSPRING water filters for coffee machines use activated carbon and resins to filter out components such as chlorine and calcium from the water, significantly improving its quality, hardness, and taste. In addition, tiny particles of plastic and other impurities are also filtered out.

PREMIUM FILTER MATERIAL: Our material is food-safe, resin-free, and sodium-free, reducing lime deposits in the water. The filter also leads to softer water, which protects the machine and makes it more durable.

NOTE: Before the first use, place the filter in clean tap water for 5-10 minutes to rinse and remove air bubbles. For best results, we recommend replacing the filter every 6 months. The frequency depends on the water quality.
